title: thelypteris caudiculata
intro: Thelypteris caudiculata, also known as the rattan fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris caudiculata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
